## Meeting Purpose

[Walkthrough of Metronome's Webflow CMS for GrowthX team to manage blog content.](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX team needs access to Metronome's Webflow CMS; Stephanie will follow up on this](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Blog posts require specific image formatting (AVIF for most, JPEG/PNG for social sharing)](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Custom HTML/CSS may be needed for certain elements (tables, quotes); GrowthX can reach out for guidance](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Author rotation (Stephanie, Chang, Maggie) recommended to avoid appearing AI-generated](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

## Topics

### CMS Navigation and Blog Post Creation

  - [Access Webflow CMS via "Metronome New" build](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Create new posts under "Blogs" tab](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Fields include title, slug, author, tags, publication date, images, meta description, and article body](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Custom formatting available (headings, HTML, code blocks)](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
  - [Table of contents and CTA options at bottom of post editor](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### Image Requirements

  - [Most images need to be in AVIF format for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Social sharing image should be a small JPEG or PNG](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Stephanie will share developer's notes on image specifications](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Custom Styling and HTML

  - [Some elements (quotes, tables) may require custom HTML](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [GrowthX can use existing posts as references or ask GPT for HTML generation](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [Webflow preview doesn't show custom HTML; always QA after publishing](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)

### Glossary Items

  - [Glossary entries also managed through CMS](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Potential for more complex implementation (e.g., Charge B style) may require additional work](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)

### Webflow Collaboration

  - [Multiple users can work simultaneously without being kicked out](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)
  - [Unclear if concurrent editing of the same post is possible; to be tested](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)

### Content Assets

  - [Plan for blog post images and assets to be discussed further](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Ada to provide examples of featured images in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Possibility of template images with updatable text to streamline process](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Stephanie to follow up on Webflow CMS access for GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [GrowthX to reach out if custom HTML/CSS guidance is needed](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Sydney to provide update on potential glossary support](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Review Ada's featured image examples in Slack and decide on approach](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Stephanie to request template images from Chris and Carolyn for streamlined blog post creation](https://fathom.video/share/qmrGWyMFVHAHRmtg9S_7G_f__svHBSta?tab=summary&timestamp=1134.0)
